basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant Group-C Recruitment 2026 Notification OUT - Apply Online for 2,759 AGTA Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has officially released a recruitment notification for Technical Assistant. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 24-03-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: 22-05-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 11-06-2026 Last Date for Fee Payment: 11-06-2026 Last Date for Application Correction: 18-06-2026 Date of Mains Written Examination: To be notified later

age_limit.details: Minimum Age Limit: 21 Years Maximum Age limit: 40 Years Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per UPSSSC rules.

selection_process: The UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant (AGTA) / Technical Assistant Group C Recruitment 2026 selection process comprises shortlisting on the basis of UPSSSC PET 2025 scores
a mains written examination and document verification. Only PET 2025 qualified candidates will be allowed to appear in the UPSSSC AGTA mains exam.

Candidates must have a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 scorecard to apply for the UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C mains examination. UPSSSC will prepare a list of eligible candidates for AGTA mains based on PET 2025 scores
reservation rules and post‑wise vacancy distribution. Only shortlisted candidates
as per the criteria given in the official notification
will be permitted to fill the UPSSSC AGTA mains online form and appear for the written exam.

The mains written exam for UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant Group C will be an objective type paper covering agriculture and related subjects as per the prescribed syllabus. The question paper will carry a fixed number of questions and marks (details like total marks

duration and negative marking will be as per the official AGTA notification). Candidates must secure the minimum qualifying marks and rank high in the merit list to be considered for the next stage of the selection process.
Candidates shortlisted on the basis of performance in the AGTA mains written exam will be called for document verification (DV). During DV
candidates must produce original documents and certificates related to age
and other eligibility criteria. Failure to produce valid documents or any discrepancy in information can lead to cancellation of candidature for UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Recruitment 2026.
The final selection list for UPSSSC AGTA Recruitment 2026 will be prepared purely on the basis of marks obtained in the mains written examination
subject to successful document verification and fulfilment of all eligibility conditions.
how_to_apply: The application process for UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant (AGTA) / Technical Assistant Group C Recruitment 2026 is completely online. Only candidates who have a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 registration and score can fill the UPSSSC AGTA online form 2026 on the official website upsssc.gov.in.
Step 1: Visit the official website of Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission at upsssc.gov.in.
Step 2: On the home page, click on the “Notifications/Advertisements” section and open the link for Advt. No. 06-Exam/2026 – Technical Assistant Group C (AGTA) Recruitment 2026.
Step 3: Read the UPSSSC AGTA Notification 2026 carefully, then click on the “Apply” or “Candidate Registration” link given against the advertisement.
Step 4: Log in using your UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number, date of birth and other required details; the system will fetch your basic data from the PET database.
Step 5: Fill the UPSSSC AGTA online application form 2026 with category, educational qualification, agriculture degree details, reservation information and other required fields.
Step 6: Upload your recent passport size photograph and signature in the prescribed format and size as mentioned in the UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C notification.
Step 7: Pay the UPSSSC AGTA application fee of ₹25 (for all categories) using the available online payment options such as net banking, debit/credit card, SBI I‑Collect or e‑challan.

Step 8: Review all the details entered in the UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C application form carefully, then submit the form and take a printout of the final submitted application and fee receipt for future reference.
Candidates should complete the UPSSSC AGTA Online Form 2026 well before the last date to avoid last minute technical issues and ensure successful submission.

faq.question: Q1. What is UPSSSC AGTA Recruitment 2026 for Technical Assistant Group C?
faq.answer: UPSSSC AGTA Recruitment 2026 is a mains examination‑based recruitment by Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) for 2759 posts of Agriculture Technical Assistant (AGTA) / Technical Assistant Group C in the state Agriculture Department, notified under Advt. No. 06‑Exam/2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: UPSSSC has released a total of 2759 vacancies for Technical Assistant Group C (AGTA) posts, distributed as UR 1107, SC 579, ST 55, OBC 745 and EWS 273, with horizontal reservation applicable as per UP government rules

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Online Form 2026?
faq.answer: As per the notification and major job portals, the UPSSSC AGTA 2026 online application is expected to start from 22 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 11 June 2026, while the correction window is likely available up to 18 June 2026; exam date and admit card release will be notified separately on upsssc.gov.in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for UPSSSC AGTA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 score and a Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture or equivalent such as B.Sc (Hons) Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, B.Tech Agricultural Engineering, or a 4‑year degree in Home Science/Community Science from a recognized agricultural university, along with other conditions specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant (AGTA) 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age for UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C is 21 years and the maximum age is 40 years as per the date mentioned in the notification, with upper age relaxation applicable for reserved categories according to Uttar Pradesh government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Online Form 2026?
faq.answer: The UPSSSC AGTA 2026 application fee is ₹25 for all categories including General, OBC, EWS, SC, ST and PwD candidates, which mainly covers the online processing charges and can be paid via SBI I‑Collect, net banking, debit/credit card or e‑challan.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for UPSSSC AGTA / Technical Assistant Group C 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting based on UPSSSC PET 2025 scores, followed by a mains written examination for Agriculture Technical Assistant Group C and then document verification; the final merit list will be prepared on the basis of marks obtained in the mains exam subject to successful DV.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant (AGTA) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must visit upsssc.gov.in, open Advt. No. 06‑Exam/2026 under “Notifications/Advertisements”, log in using their UPSSSC PET 2025 registration details, fill the Technical Assistant Group C online form, upload photo and signature, pay the ₹25 fee and finally submit and print the application.

faq.question: Q9. Is UPSSSC PET 2025 mandatory for UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, only candidates who have appeared in and obtained a valid score in UPSSSC PET 2025 are eligible to apply, as the commission will use PET 2025 scores to shortlist candidates for the AGTA mains exam as per the criteria given in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job profile and pay scale of UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant Group C?
faq.answer: UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistants support field‑level agricultural extension work, implementation of government schemes and crop advisory services in rural areas, with the pay scale generally reported as Level‑4 (around ₹25,500–81,100 plus allowances) as per similar UPSSSC AGTA notifications.
